_doc: QUAKE LEGACY LoRA manifest. All SDXL. Download to E:\PersonalAI\ComfyUI\models\loras\

photoreal_boost.prompt_prefix: photorealistic, ultra detailed, physically based rendering, 8k,
photoreal_boost.description: Pushes SDXL output toward photorealism. Stack on top of tile_d35.
photoreal_boost.notes: Subtle at 0.5, strong at 0.8. Combine with tile_d35 for clean PBR upgrade.

cel_shade.trigger: neon cel shading, cel shaded, neon realism,
cel_shade.prompt_prefix: cel shading, neon realism, bold outlines, vibrant colors, game art,
cel_shade.description: Neonify SDXL — cel shading + neon realism. 5 LoRA levels, v2.3 extreme.
cel_shade.notes: Start at strength=0.5 (vanilla neon), go to 0.9 for max cartoon. Great for mapobjects and player models.

cartoon.prompt_prefix: cel shading, cartoon, flat shading, bold outline, stylized game art,
cartoon.description: CGI anime / cartoon cel shading. Strong at 0.85. Trigger: 'cel shading'.
cartoon.notes: Works well for players and weapons. Icons and sprites may over-stylize — use upscale_only for those.

photoreal_touch.prompt_prefix: photorealistic, skin detail, pore detail, subsurface scattering,
photoreal_touch.description: PhotorealTouch v3 — face/skin specialist. Best for player head textures.
photoreal_touch.notes: Ideal for player_face category at d=0.35. Combine with tile_sdxl_lora.json.

retro_quake.trigger: quake retro, id software style, 90s fps,
retro_quake.prompt_prefix: quake retro aesthetic, id software, 90s fps game, grungy metal, dark industrial,
retro_quake.description: Custom LoRA — needs training on Quake/DOOM asset corpus. Not yet available.
retro_quake.notes: Train on pak00 originals + reference Q3A screenshots. ~2000 image pairs. Future work.

painterly.prompt_prefix: oil painting, brush strokes, painterly, textured canvas, artstation,
painterly.description: Painterly / oil painting style. Good for mapobjects and wall textures.
painterly.source: Search civitai.com for 'painterly SDXL LoRA' — multiple options
painterly.notes: Try at denoise=0.50 with tile ControlNet for texture-detail maps.

anime.prompt_prefix: anime style, manga, clean line art, vibrant, flat cel shading,
anime.description: Anime/manga conversion. Fun experiment for player skins.
anime.source: Search civitai.com for 'anime SDXL LoRA' — many options (Pastel Anime, etc.)
anime.notes: Use at d=0.40–0.50 with tile ControlNet for anime player skins.

download_instructions.civitai: Browse to civitai_model_id URL, click Download, save .safetensors to E:\PersonalAI\ComfyUI\models\loras\
download_instructions.huggingface: Use download_controlnet.py as template, change URL and DEST path.
download_instructions.restart_required: Restart ComfyUI after adding new LoRA files for them to appear in LoraLoader dropdown.
